headline: Assessing General Mills (GIS) Valuation After A Year Of Weak Shareholder Returns
summary: Why General Mills is on investors’ radar General Mills (GIS) is drawing fresh attention after recent share performance, with the stock down over the past month and past 3 months, and a one year total return decline of 34.19%. At a last close of US$34.72 and a market value of about US$18.7b, the packaged foods group behind Cheerios, Häagen-Dazs and Blue Buffalo is being reassessed by investors focused on earnings resilience and income potential.
